headline: 31 contracts catalogued across Kinetiq staking, governance, and institutional deployments on Hyperliquid L1

findings.text: Official deployments doc located at https://kinetiq.xyz/docs/contracts-and-audits; documents 31 contract addresses across kHYPE liquid staking, kmHYPE markets, and 4 institutional deployments (Flowdesk, Hyperion, ASXN, HYLQ)
8 audit reports extracted from contracts-and-audits page spanning June 2025–January 2026 by Spearbit, Zenith, Pashov Audit Group, Code4rena; scope contracts identified
GitHub org (kinetiq-research) verified but contains only utility repos (hl-rs, hl-cli, f1rewall); no smart contract source deployment artifacts discovered

Block explorer: hyperevmscan.io confirmed as official explorer for Hyperliquid L1; KNTQ governance token address 0x000000000000780555bd0bca3791f89f9542c2d6 confirmed via multiple sources; KNTQ uses EIP-1967 transparent proxy with implementation at 0x987aadf0f8b7ebe9a3a633e9f1d8c1c684b18e17

Role taxonomy applied: token contracts (kHYPE, kmHYPE, flowHYPE, HiHYPE, asxnHYPE, hylqHYPE, KNTQ), manager contracts (StakingManager, ExchangeManager, OracleManager, ValidatorManager), supporting infrastructure (PauserRegistry, OracleAdapter, GlobalConfig, BlockedWithdrawalQueue), and operator EOAs
Single chain (Hyperliquid L1/HyperEVM); all addresses belong to same unified blockchain; no multi-chain enumeration required

rationale.verdict: Discovery slice documents 31 contract addresses across Kinetiq's core protocol (kHYPE staking), Markets expansion (kmHYPE), and 4 institutional liquid staking variants, sourced from official deployments documentation, audit PDFs, and block explorer verification.

evidence.shows: Official deployments documentation listing all 31 contract addresses organized by product (kHYPE, kmHYPE, and institutional variants Flowdesk/flowHYPE, Hyperion/HiHYPE, ASXN/asxnHYPE, HYLQ/hylqHYPE); also lists 8 audit reports with dates and auditor names
Homepage confirms protocol operates on Hyperliquid L1 (HyperEVM) for liquid staking of HYPE token; references documentation site and security/audit resources
Main docs landing page confirms Kinetiq builds on Hyperliquid L1 with native integration; mentions 4 independent security audits and governance framework with multisig safeguards

KNTQ governance token page; launched November 2025 with 1 billion max supply; sKNTQ staking live since December 2025 with 7-day withdrawal period; captures protocol revenues from validator commissions, staking, and market fees

KNTQ tokenomics documentation; confirms 1 billion max supply, vesting: 1-year cliff + 2-year monthly vest for core/investors; 100% of protocol disposable revenue directed to KNTQ buybacks distributed to sKNTQ stakers

GitHub organization verified for domain kinetiq.xyz; contains 3 repos (hl-rs, hl-cli, f1rewall) — Hyperliquid SDK/CLI tooling and Discord gateway; no smart contract deployment artifacts or source code repos visible
kHYPE token on hyperevmscan.io (primary block explorer for Hyperliquid L1); confirms kHYPE contract address 0xfD739d4e423301CE9385c1fb8850539D657C296D with protocol description
KNTQ governance token on hyperevmscan.io; EIP-1967 transparent proxy pattern; implementation contract at 0x987aadf0f8b7ebe9a3a633e9f1d8c1c684b18e17

unknowns: D6: No factory contracts identified in documentation; D6 cap rule not triggered
D6: sKNTQ staking contract address not discoverable from fetched sources; address may exist on-chain but specific contract address not documented in official deployments page
D8: Operator addresses marked with asterisk (*) in official docs but no additional role/admin context provided; recorded in admin_addresses with role 'operator' pending further verification

protocol_metadata.about: Kinetiq is a liquid staking protocol built natively on the Hyperliquid L1 blockchain that enables users to stake HYPE tokens and receive kHYPE, a yield-bearing liquid staking token. The protocol features StakeHub, an autonomous validator scoring and delegation system that automatically routes staked capital to top-performing validators. Kinetiq has expanded beyond core staking to include Markets by Kinetiq (kmHYPE) for on-chain equities trading, institutional staking variants (iHYPE), and governance via the KNTQ token launched in November 2025.
